from structure ["NiO, Cr2O3, Fe2O3 oxide scale with NiCr2O4 spinel formation"] connected to property ["Lower oxidation rate (Kp=0.147\u00d710^-10 g\u00b2cm\u207b\u2074s\u207b\u00b9) in air"] because of mechanism 'Continuous Cr2O3 layer reduces oxygen diffusion and slows oxidation kinetics'
from processing ["Hot corrosion in Na2SO4-60% V2O5 molten salt at 900\u00b0C for 100 cycles"] connected to structure ["NiO, Cr2O3, Fe2O3 oxide scale with NiCr2O4 spinel formation"] because of mechanism 'Sulfate-vanadate melt accelerates oxidation and forms mixed oxides through liquid-phase corrosion'
from processing ["Cyclic oxidation in air at 900\u00b0C for 100 cycles (1h heating + 20min cooling)"] connected to structure ["NiO, Cr2O3, Fe2O3 oxide scale with NiCr2O4 spinel formation"] because of mechanism 'Cyclic thermal exposure promotes formation of protective NiO/Cr2O3 layers through oxidation of Ni and Cr'
